data.body: C1 (524d) plan-review #1 = INDETERMINATE (verify step token-cap truncation across 29 findings; 0 blocking, 1 minor advisory). Remediated by tightening the plan: added a 'Design decisions' section nailing down _is_cas_mismatch ref_name seam, _cas_once 3-outcome factoring, RefLockCorruptError conditions, fence rules, optional remote (distributed CAS via --force-with-lease, wiring deferred to C3), subprocess timeouts+RefLockTimeoutError, AC0 ref->commit fallback mechanics, operator break-glass runbook; fixed AC5 stale-oid-release contradiction (now idempotent success); added timeout/log/backward-compat-regression ACs. Re-running review.
